name: iMessage MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Apple iMessage — enabling AI agents to read iMessage conversations, retrieve message history, and send messages through the macOS Messages app. Enables AI-assisted communication workflows on Apple devices — reading conversation context, drafting replies, and automating message-based workflows.
use_cases: Reading iMessage conversation history from AI communication agents
Drafting and sending iMessages from productivity automation agents
Monitoring important message threads for AI-assisted communication management
Integrating iMessage data into personal assistant AI workflows on macOS
not_for: High-volume automated messaging (Apple's rate limits and ToS apply)
Business communication requiring audit trails (personal messaging app)
best_when: A macOS user wants AI agents to read and respond to iMessages — managing personal communication workflows, drafting context-aware replies, and maintaining message organization through AI assistance.
avoid_when: You use Android or cross-platform messaging. iMessage is Apple-only and requires macOS with the Messages app. Sensitive personal messages — implement strict access controls.

auth.notes: macOS system access — uses local Messages database. Requires Full Disk Access permission on macOS. No external auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — iMessage is free on Apple devices
pricing.notes: Free open source community tool. Requires Apple device with iMessage.

performance.rate_limits: Apple Messages sending rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Requires macOS Full Disk Access permission — significant privacy permission grant
iMessage database access reads all messages — agents see all conversations, not just specified ones
Sending messages via agent automation could be unexpected by recipients — implement clear consent
macOS Messages database format may change with OS updates — verify compatibility after macOS upgrades
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY SENSITIVE: Full access to all iMessage conversations. Full Disk Access macOS permission required. Personal communication data is highly sensitive. Restrict to specific conversations/contacts.

security_score_components.security_notes: Highly sensitive personal message data. Full Disk Access required. All conversations readable. Strict access controls essential.
